case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. CLAUDIA PALAFOX et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION STEPHEN S. ZELLER FILED RE: CCP 1033 FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT PALAFOX, CLAUDIA DOES 1 TO 10. INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-25-2010
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK SERVED MAY-11-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PALAFOX, CLAUDIA
DECLARATION STEPHEN S. ZELLER FILED RE: WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PALAFOX, CLAUDIA
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $255.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PALAFOX, CLAUDIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PALAFOX, CLAUDIA $6,646.92 PRINCIPAL, $255.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,901.92, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $920.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PALAFOX, CLAUDIA
DECLARATION STEPHEN S. ZELLER FILED RE: UNDERLYING ACTION OF ACCOUNT STATED FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $41.58 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10. INCLUSIVE
